holland.desc: Directly selected from Amsterdam's finest auction houses.

world.title: Worldwide Delivery
world.desc: Delivered to any destination in the world within 1 day.

collection.title: Collection
collection.sub: Holland's rarest flowers, from Fethiye to the world.

testimonials.subtitle: The Best Florist in Fethiye on Google

items.quote: Even though they just opened, one of the best florists in Fethiye. Flowers are fresh, service is first-class.
items.author: Gezgin Dünyası

items.quote: A family-run business that knows hospitality and quality service. Every detail is thoughtful.
items.author: Hkn Koçalan

items.quote: Every flower is more beautiful than the last — I won't buy from anywhere else now. Highly recommend.
items.author: Berivan

story.title:
From Amsterdam
to your door.
story.p1: Every morning the freshest, rarest flowers are hand-picked at Amsterdam's Aalsmeer auction — Holland Premium quality, delivered to Fethiye with an unbroken cold chain.
story.p2: Each bouquet is arranged by hand in our atelier. In-season, fresh, and exactly right. Anywhere in Turkey within 2 hours; worldwide within 1 day.

footer.tagline: The art of flowers, at your door.
footer.subtitle: Holland Premium Florist
